title: 3.28.0b Hotfix 3
changes: Fixed a bug where Minions' Base Attack Critical Strike Chance is equal to the Critical Strike Chance of your Main Hand Weapon was not always functional.
Fixed a petrification debuff being stuck at 0.0 seconds if you are hit rapidly.
Fixed a bug where Fulgurite Tincture's chance to shock was not applying and Borealwood Tincture's chance to freeze was also applying to chance to shock.
Animate Guardians Weapon now also follows you through area transitions.
Tornadoes from Bismuth Ores no longer damage the tree in Petrified Amber Ore encounters.
